name: games played with multiple rate types
description: Test case for games played with multiple rate types
expected_query: with "t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb" as (select "player_gamelogs"."pid", count(*) as "rate_type_total_count", array_agg(distinct player_gamelogs.tm) as teams from "player_gamelogs" where "player_gamelogs"."active" = true group by "player_gamelogs"."pid"), "t335663aa03c109b219d83d28dc9b4e11" as (select COALESCE(trg_pid) as pid, SUM(CASE WHEN comp = true THEN recv_yds ELSE 0 END) as rec_yds_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' group by COALESCE(trg_pid)) select "player"."pid", t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb.rate_type_total_count as games_played_0, CAST(t335663aa03c109b219d83d28dc9b4e11.rec_yds_from_plays AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(CAST(t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb.rate_type_total_count AS DECIMAL), 0) AS "rec_yds_from_plays_0", CAST(t335663aa03c109b219d83d28dc9b4e11.rec_yds_from_plays AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(CAST(t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb.rate_type_total_count AS DECIMAL), 0) AS "rec_yds_from_plays_1", "player"."pos" from "player" left join "t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb" on "t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "t335663aa03c109b219d83d28dc9b4e11" on "t335663aa03c109b219d83d28dc9b4e11"."pid" = "player"."pid" group by t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb.rate_type_total_count, "t335663aa03c109b219d83d28dc9b4e11"."rec_yds_from_plays", t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb.rate_type_total_count, "t335663aa03c109b219d83d28dc9b4e11"."rec_yds_from_plays", t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb.rate_type_total_count, "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 3 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
